sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Barlow Wealth Partners Inc. Invests $12.64 Million in McKesson Corporation $MCK
feed.summary: Barlow Wealth Partners Inc. has acquired a new stake of 15,887 shares in McKesson Corporation (NYSE:MCK), valued at approximately $12.64 million, during the third quarter. McKesson, a global healthcare services company, reported strong Q3 earnings, beating EPS estimates, and has a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $895.79. Institutional investors collectively own about 85.07% of the company's stock.

feed.title: Intuit Inc. $INTU Shares Purchased by Barlow Wealth Partners Inc.
feed.summary: Barlow Wealth Partners Inc. has increased its stake in Intuit Inc. (NASDAQ:INTU) by 30.9%, now owning 23,085 shares valued at $15.49 million, making it their 28th largest holding. This comes amidst significant insider selling, with CEO Sasan Goodarzi selling 41,000 shares worth $26.65 million, though insiders still hold 2.49% of the company. Intuit recently exceeded Q1 earnings and revenue estimates and maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts.

feed.title: Bank of Jackson Hole Trust Buys 2,423 Shares of International Business Machines Corporation $IBM

feed.title: Belpointe Asset Management LLC Purchases 30,833 Shares of Bristol Myers Squibb Company $BMY
feed.summary: Belpointe Asset Management LLC increased its stake in Bristol Myers Squibb (NYSE: BMY) by 42.6% in the third quarter, acquiring an additional 30,833 shares, bringing its total holdings to $4.66 million. Institutional investors collectively own a significant portion of BMY, with major players like Vanguard and Charles Schwab also increasing their positions. Bristol Myers Squibb exceeded Q3 earnings expectations and raised its quarterly dividend, although its FY2025 EPS guidance was slightly below analyst predictions.

feed.title: Prediction: These 2 Top Stocks Will Be the Largest REIT Dividend Payers in 2026
feed.summary: The article predicts that Prologis (PLD) and American Tower (AMT) will be the largest REIT dividend payers in 2026, building on their lead from the previous year. Both companies are expected to increase their dividend payments by about 5% due to strong financial performance, comfortable payout ratios, and strengthened balance sheets. Prologis's core FFO per share is projected to rise, while American Tower, having achieved its leverage target, is poised to resume dividend growth.

feed.title: Why Stifel Sees IBM as a "Safe Compounder" in AI
feed.summary: Stifel analyst David Grossman reiterated a Buy rating on IBM with a $325.00 price target, viewing the company as a "safe compounder" in AI due to software-led growth and margin expansion potential. The firm anticipates organic software growth of 7-8% and sees service fundamentals improving. Stifel is maintaining its 2026 estimates for IBM, noting that the Confluent acquisition is expected to be modestly dilutive.

feed.title: OnTheMarket Says CoStar Backing Delivering Traffic, Stock And Leads Surge
feed.summary: OnTheMarket is reporting significant growth in traffic, inventory, and lead generation since its acquisition by CoStar Group in December 2023. The company, which aims to challenge the UK’s existing portal duopoly, states website visits are up 55%, page views 110%, and property stock 47%. This surge is attributed to CoStar's investment and expertise, reinforcing OnTheMarket's goal to become a leading portal in the UK.

feed.title: B. Riley Wealth Advisors Inc. Has $1.35 Million Holdings in Chipotle Mexican Grill, Inc. $CMG
feed.summary: B. Riley Wealth Advisors Inc. significantly reduced its stake in Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE: CMG) by 67.9% in the third quarter of 2025, now holding 34,525 shares valued at $1.35 million. While various other institutional investors increased their holdings, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus price target of $50.23, despite recent price target cuts and Chipotle meeting EPS estimates but missing revenue expectations in its latest quarter.

feed.title: Plug Power Balances Sines Milestone With Funding Risks And Dilution Relief
feed.summary: Plug Power has achieved a significant milestone with the completion of a large electrolyzer installation at Galp's Sines Refinery in Europe, establishing itself as a key player in green hydrogen solutions. Concurrently, the company is addressing its capital structure through a shareholder meeting to vote on authorized shares and has removed a potential dilution risk by modifying its agreement with Walmart. These developments highlight Plug Power's dual focus on expanding its industrial-scale projects while managing financial stability and shareholder concerns.

feed.title: Does WEC’s Leadership Transition and Higher Dividend Payout Reshape Its Long‑Term Capital Allocation Story (WEC)?
feed.summary: WEC Energy Group is undergoing a leadership transition with Gale Klappa retiring and Scott Lauber taking over as chairman and CEO, signaling strategic continuity. The company also increased its quarterly dividend to US$0.9525 per share. These developments reinforce WEC's focus on consistent earnings, a strong dividend record, and disciplined capital allocation.

feed.title: Why Stifel Sees IBM as a “Safe Compounder” in AI
feed.summary: Stifel analyst David Grossman reiterated a Buy rating for International Business Machines Corporation (NYSE: IBM) with a $325.00 price target, viewing the company as a "safe compounder" in AI. This positive outlook is attributed to IBM's software-led growth, potential for margin expansion, and defensive characteristics, with the firm maintaining its 2026 estimates for revenue, margins, EPS, and FCF. While acknowledging investment risks, Stifel recommends IBM for defensive-minded investors, despite a potential modest dilution from the Confluent acquisition not yet reflected in estimates.

feed.title: Alta Wealth Advisors LLC Takes $1.37 Million Position in Leidos Holdings, Inc. $LDOS
feed.summary: Alta Wealth Advisors LLC has initiated a new position in Leidos Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:LDOS) by purchasing 7,226 shares valued at approximately $1.37 million during the third quarter. This move is part of broader institutional interest, with several other firms increasing their stakes in the aerospace company. Leidos recently acquired power design firm ENTRUST for $2.4 billion, a strategic move expected to bolster its energy/utility engineering capabilities and revenue growth.

feed.title: A Look At Boston Properties (BXP) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
feed.summary: Boston Properties (BXP) has experienced recent share price weakness, with declines over the past month and three months, contrasting with a positive three-year return. Despite trading at US$64.77, below some estimated value measures, the article explores whether this presents a buying opportunity or reflects anticipated future growth. While one narrative suggests BXP is 18.5% undervalued with a fair value of $79.43 based on future office demand and strategic capital recycling, a Discounted Cash Flow model indicates an even higher fair value of US$97.

feed.title: Ross Stores Former Chairman Norman Ferber Passes Away
feed.summary: Norman Ferber, former Chairman and CEO of Ross Stores, passed away on January 23, 2026, at the age of 77. Ferber was instrumental in transforming Ross Stores from a small chain into a leading off-price retailer. The company and the Ross Stores Foundation have honored his memory through contributions to the Ross Cares Fund and the naming of an Art and Academic Room, reflecting his commitment to community and education.

feed.title: Oppenheimer upgrades WW Grainger stock to Outperform with $1,250 target By Investing.com
feed.summary: Oppenheimer has upgraded WW Grainger (NYSE:GWW) stock from Perform to Outperform, setting a price target of $1,250.00, citing the company's strong model for annual high-touch solutions outgrowth and its positioning for over 4% price realization. The upgrade also considers GWW's adoption of artificial intelligence leading to operational benefits and its impressive track record of dividend increases for 33 consecutive years. This analysis follows recent news of GWW exceeding third-quarter earnings expectations and Bernstein initiating coverage with a Market Perform rating.

feed.title: Cisco Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ:CSCO) Given Average Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" by Analysts

However, there has been significant insider selling, with CEO Charles Robbins and other insiders selling millions of dollars worth of shares in the last 90 days.

feed.title: Northrop Grumman Gears Up For Q4 Print; Here Are The Recent Forecast Changes From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts

Recent analyst ratings show a mix of upgrades, downgrades, and price target adjustments, reflecting varied expert opinions on NOC's stock performance. Noteworthy changes include a UBS analyst raising their price target to $777 and a Truist Securities analyst downgrading the stock from Buy to Hold.

feed.title: Brown & Brown, Inc. announces fourth quarter 2025 results, including total revenues of $1.6 billion, an increase of 35.7%; Organic Revenue decrease of 2.8%; diluted net income per share of $0.59; and Diluted Net Income Per Share - Adjusted of $0.93
feed.summary: Brown & Brown, Inc. announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025, with total revenues reaching $1.6 billion for Q4, a 35.7% increase, and $5.9 billion for the full year, a 22.8% increase. Despite a 2.8% decrease in Organic Revenue for the fourth quarter, the company reported adjusted diluted net income per share of $0.93 for Q4 and $4.26 for the full year, exhibiting strong growth. J. Powell Brown, President and CEO, highlighted the acquisition of Accession, robust revenue growth, and expanding adjusted margins as key successes for 2025.

feed.title: 5 Must-Read Analyst Questions From D.R. Horton's Q4 Earnings Call
feed.summary: D.R. Horton's Q4 earnings call revealed insights into the company's performance, which exceeded revenue and GAAP profit expectations due to increased sales incentives and cost control. Analysts questioned management on various topics, including SG&A drivers, community count growth, incentive trajectory, policy impacts on rental business, and the balance between market share and margin. Future focus areas for analysts include sales incentives, inventory turnover, housing policy developments, and mortgage rate shifts.

feed.title: Stifel Sees Signs of a Demand Recovery for Texas Instruments (TXN)
feed.summary: Stifel analyst Tore Svanberg raised Texas Instruments' price target to $200 from $170, maintaining a Hold rating, citing signs of demand recovery for analog chips and solid AI infrastructure spending. Texas Instruments, a global semiconductor company, produces chips for various markets including AI-focused data centers, aerospace, and industrial automation, leading to increased demand for its semiconductors as AI integration grows.

The consensus projects earnings of $2.24 per share and revenue of $45.79 billion. Several analysts have recently raised their price targets and reaffirmed or upgraded their ratings for GM, indicating a positive sentiment.

feed.title: SLB and Aker CC venture hit by loss on carbon capture project
feed.summary: SLB reported a loss on a carbon capture project involving its SLB Capturi joint venture with Aker Carbon Capture. The project's details were not extensively elaborated, but the news highlights challenges in the carbon capture sector for major energy service companies. The article was published on January 27, 2026.

feed.title: Motorola Solutions, Inc. (NYSE:MSI) Given Average Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" by Brokerages
feed.summary: Motorola Solutions, Inc. (NYSE:MSI) has received a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from ten brokerages, with seven analysts issuing buy ratings and three issuing hold ratings. The average 12-month target price is set at $491.86. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating estimates with EPS of $4.06 and revenue of $3.01 billion, while also increasing its quarterly dividend to $1.21.

feed.title: Bernstein Calls 2026 a "Waiting Year" for Amgen's (AMGN) MariTide
feed.summary: Bernstein has downgraded Amgen Inc. (AMGN) to Market Perform, citing 2026 as a "waiting year" for its drug MariTide and potential risks to Repatha. The firm maintained its $335 price target. Separately, Amgen announced the acquisition of Dark Blue Therapeutics Ltd. for up to $840 million, strengthening its oncology pipeline with a new investigational small molecule for acute myeloid leukemia.

feed.title: Merck's (MRK) Quality is Clear, but Growth Visibility Matters, TD Cowen Notes
feed.summary: TD Cowen analyst Steve Scala raised Merck & Co., Inc. (MRK) price target to $120 from $100, maintaining a Hold rating while noting the company's strong quality. Despite this, Scala emphasized that Merck needs to demonstrate a clearer long-term growth outlook to stand out as a top pharma pick. Merck has responded by raising projections for new growth drivers, now expecting $70 billion in revenue by the mid-2030s, and shared positive results for its personalized cancer vaccine in combination with Keytruda.

feed.title: BofA Delivers Strong Q4, but Leverage Outlook Disappoints, TD Cowen Notes
feed.summary: Bank of America (BAC) reported stronger-than-expected Q4 results, but TD Cowen lowered its price target due to a disappointing outlook on operating leverage from management. Despite this, the bank had a strong 2025 with $30.5 billion in profit and plans to issue $1 billion in equity awards to employees. The broader banking industry anticipates an active year for dealmaking and potential boosts to net interest income.

feed.title: RBB Bancorp (NASDAQ:RBB) Reports Q4 2025 Earnings Beat, Revenue Miss
feed.summary: RBB Bancorp reported mixed financial results for Q4 2025, with an earnings beat of $0.59 EPS against an estimate of $0.49, but a slight revenue miss of $32.32 million against a forecast of $33.53 million. The market reaction was neutral in after-hours trading, suggesting investors are balancing the positive EPS surprise with the revenue shortfall. Analysts are now looking ahead to Q1 2026 and full fiscal year 2026 revenue and EPS estimates.

feed.title: NRx Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ:NRXP) Given Average Rating of "Moderate Buy" by Brokerages
feed.summary: NRx Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:NRXP) has received a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating from six brokerages, with an average 12-month target price of $36.75. Despite recent missed quarterly earnings estimates, institutional investors have increased their stakes, though overall institutional ownership remains low at 4.27%. The company, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical firm, is focused on repurposing small-molecule therapeutics for CNS and rare disease indications.

feed.title: Li Auto Inc. Sponsored ADR (LI) Outpaces Stock Market Gains: What You Should Know
feed.summary: Li Auto Inc. Sponsored ADR (LI) saw a 1.38% increase in its stock price, outperforming the S&P 500's daily gain of 0.5%. Despite this recent uptick, the company's shares had decreased by 4.19% over the past month. Analysts are forecasting a significant year-over-year decline in EPS and revenue for its upcoming earnings release, leading to a Zacks Rank of #4 (Sell) for the stock.

feed.title: ePlus (PLUS) Submits Automatic Mixed Securities Shelf Filing
feed.summary: ePlus Inc. (PLUS) has filed an automatic mixed securities shelf, enhancing its flexibility to raise capital through various securities without needing separate announcements. The company, a technology solutions provider with a $2.31 billion market capitalization, exhibits strong financial health and consistent performance. While valuation metrics suggest a modestly overvalued position and recent insider selling occurred, ePlus maintains robust profitability and growth.

feed.title: Itaú Unibanco Publishes Global Policy Governing Trading of Its Securities
feed.summary: Itaú Unibanco (ITUB) has published a new global policy regarding the trading of its securities, formalized via a Form 6-K filed on January 26, 2026. This policy aims to enhance transparency and investor protection by tightening insider-trading controls and clarifying trading restrictions for insiders and related parties worldwide. The new framework sets detailed rules, blackout periods, and responsibilities for a Disclosure and Trading Committee, reinforcing the bank's compliance in both Brazilian and U.S. capital markets.
